title: The most insane week in AI
summary: AI Search covers a week of significant AI releases including DeepSeek V4, Kimi K2.6, MiMo v2.5, GPT 5.5, GPT Images 2, and Qwen 3.6, along with research projects in game simulation, detection, design collaboration, geometry, and video editing. The video highlights emerging tools and models across language, vision, and embodied AI domains.
